A.evidence: Clean markdown, faithful prose, proper LaTeX math, Alg1 as clean table; only cut at shared byte cap.

B.evidence: Faithful prose and good LaTeX math, but headings are plain text and the Sec 2 header is dropped.

C.evidence: A-grade markdown/math marred by a full-page raw bbox JSON layout dump breaking the document.

D.evidence: Prose intact but math littered with broken subscript fragments; Alg1 eqns mangled, mean missing.

E.evidence: Jumbled reading order, duplicated headers/formulas, and a garbled hallucinated sentence.

F.evidence: Clean prose/headers but ~10 display eqns dropped as formula-not-decoded (incl Alg1); abstract misordered.

G.evidence: Catastrophic degenerate loops (thousands of repeated '1' and 'sum'), blank-space equations, jumbled.

H.evidence: Clean markdown, strong LaTeX math with preserved reference links; Alg1 array cut at the cap.
